question: Chapters
feedback: Text does not list the main sections of the thesis. It only provides a brief description of the problem and the proposed solution.

question: Description
feedback: Text briefly describes contents of each section, but it is not detailed enough to understand what specific topics will be covered in each section.

question: Structure
feedback: Yes, the text can be easily understood as a general structure of the thesis. It starts with a problem statement, followed by a proposed solution and an explanation of its importance in the context of information technology and software development.
